subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One hath turned His face from the direction of the Prison towards him who hath been named Kázim, and We make mention of him through that which diffuseth fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد توجه وجه المظلوم من شطر السجن الی من سمی بکاظم و نذکره بما تضوع منه عرف
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
